backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor file for the ICP backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of the email address with 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' across Contact, Footer, and index.html, with high confidence and linked test ID REQ-9.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short human-readable summaries describing the purpose and key content of each frontend file.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry point that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: SEO-optimized HTML entry point for VERDIER COUVERTURE with meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, Google Fonts, and JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data including the updated email sv.couverture95@gmail.com.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page landing site by composing Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Testimonials, Contact, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column About section presenting VERDIER COUVERTURE's history since 2004, three value propositions, and a certifications list, all in French.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a validated devis request form, info cards showing phone numbers, the updated email sv.couverture95@gmail.com as a mailto link, address, and opening hours — all in French.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Four-column footer displaying brand info, both phone numbers as tel: links, the updated email sv.couverture95@gmail.com as a mailto link, address, and navigation/service links for VERDIER COUVERTURE.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section for a French roofing company, featuring a background image, headline, key highlights, phone numbers, and smooth-scroll CTA buttons to contact and services sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background, smooth-scroll anchor links, a logo, phone CTAs, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Grid-based services section listing six roofing offerings (e.g., full re-roofing, tile laying, repairs, insulation) each with an icon, description, and feature list.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Customer testimonials section displaying six star-rated reviews with name, location, service type, date, and initials avatar for a roofing company.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and exposing status flags to child components.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind layers and defines a warm earthy roofing-themed design system using OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark modes, plus utility component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based brand colors (terracotta, slate, offwhite), typography fonts, border radii, shadows, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 7) tracking implemented features, requirements, and architectural notes for the VERDIER COUVERTURE SEO-optimized roofing landing page built with React/Tailwind.
